description: The trees here are taller and their laces vibrate with a strange energy. A faint whispering seems to come from the canopy. To the south, a bright, sunny meadow stretches out as far as the eye can see.

wall.description: Vibrant blue shoelaces form a dense, shimmering barrier.

floor.description: Soft moss covered in loose aglets.

edge_s.description: The whispers fade as the forest opens up into a sunny meadow to the south.

item_chest.description: A small wooden chest with a leather strap.

item.name: Leather Strap
item.opened_description: The chest lies open and empty.
